content.situation: 你在五金店想买一个电钻，销售员介绍了它的电池电压和使用时间，你想确认它是否适合长时间使用。
content.speakerText: This model has a 18V lithium battery and runs for about 75 minutes on a full charge.
content.speakerTextCn: 这款是18伏锂电池，满电可用约75分钟。

blanks.answer: How long does it last under heavy use
options: How long does it last under heavy use
Is it good for home use
Does it come with a charger

content.hint: 询问在高强度使用下的续航表现，用 'How long does it last...' 开头
content.knowledgePoint: 询问设备续航能力的核心表达

content.situation: 你正在比较两款电动工具，销售员提到其中一款有双档变速功能，你想知道这对你做精细工作是否有帮助。
content.speakerText: This one has two speed settings so you can switch between precision and power.
content.speakerTextCn: 这款有两个速度档位，可以切换精准模式和动力模式。
content.responseTemplate: Interesting. ___ for detailed work like trimming wood?

options: Do you recommend the higher speed
Can I change the bit easily

content.hint: 询问特定功能是否适用于某种用途，用 'Is the ___ suitable for...' 结构
content.knowledgePoint: 询问功能适用性的表达方式

content.situation: 销售员告诉你这款电锯配备了LED照明灯，你希望确认它是否能在光线不足的环境下真正提升工作效率。
content.speakerText: It includes a bright LED light that activates automatically when you start cutting.
content.speakerTextCn: 它配有LED灯，启动时会自动亮起。
content.responseTemplate: Nice feature. ___ in dimly lit areas like basements?

options: Can I turn it off manually

content.hint: 询问功能的实际效果，用 'Does it really...?' 强调实用性
content.knowledgePoint: 评估附加功能实用性的表达
